title: pilosella florentoides subsp. pseudovenetiana
intro: Pilosella florentoides subsp. pseudovenetiana is a subspecies of the Pilosella florentoides plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pilosella florentoides subsp. pseudovenetiana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
